title: LEGEND TRADER
description:
Add a new trading villager in vanilla minecraft.this trader provide you the best and more then 50 traders
from the version 1.16 to 1.20.4
body:
This time i present you Legend Trader Datapack

If you are not getting proper trades from villagers
then
This data pack make you happy.
After reloading this data pack you get a special trader.
this trader make your Minecraft much easy.
more then 50+ trades
this villager give you cheap and best items.

This trader is best for Minecraft survival and hardcore series.

to summon this trader you have to reload the Minecraft
/reload
and use
function legend:1t
or
function legend:summon/legend

 

version supported
form- 1.16 to latest


make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files

 

enjoy the Legend Trader Datapack.

 

THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD
